description: Renovate configuration for the homelab CI/CD Components hub (the shared ci-base image + component templates)
dependencyDashboardHeader:
Tracks dependency updates for the shared ci-base image and the CI/CD component templates.

**After merging**: CI builds + signs the ci-base image; a digest-bump MR then lands in each of the four consumers before it is adopted (a bad bump here ripples to all of them).

---

customManagers.description: Extract tool versions from Dockerfile ARG variables with Renovate annotations. The first matchString handles ARGs whose value carries a tag@sha256:<digest> (DOCKER_VERSION, TRIVY_VERSION) so the digest is maintained alongside the tag; the second handles plain version ARGs (shellcheck, gitleaks, cosign, pyyaml, tqdm, yamllint, pytest, pytest-cov, requests, markdownlint-cli2).

Extract annotated image pins from component template spec defaults (e.g. the ci-image component's digest-pinned builder_image default). Unlike the Dockerfile ARGs (bare tag, the repo lives on the FROM line), a template default carries the FULL image ref `<repo>:<tag>@sha256:<digest>`. The `\S*?:` before the capture consumes the `<repo>:` prefix so currentValue is ONLY the tag (e.g. `29.6.1-cli`, not `docker:29.6.1-cli`) — otherwise the docker datasource looks up a bogus `docker:<tag>` and fails with 'Could not determine new digest'. The prefix sits outside the capture, so autoreplace rewrites only tag+digest and leaves `<repo>:` intact.

packageRules.description: Docker build base - the ci-base FROM line uses ARG indirection (FROM docker:${DOCKER_VERSION}) so the ARG value carries tag@sha256 and is seen by both the native dockerfile manager and the custom.regex annotation. With pinDigests:true the inherited docker:pinDigests probes a malformed `manifests/<tag>@sha256:<digest>` HEAD that 404s ('Could not determine new digest'). false suppresses the probe; a real tag bump still rewrites tag+digest via the autoReplaceStringTemplate, so the digest stays current.

Trivy - security vulnerability + IaC scanner, higher priority. Trivy is a base image via ARG indirection (FROM aquasec/trivy:${TRIVY_VERSION}), tracked by the custom.regex Dockerfile-ARG manager (depName aquasec/trivy) because the native dockerfile manager can't resolve the ARG. pinDigests:true bumps tag + digest together; the security label + raised priority surface scanner updates promptly.

ci-base build tool dependencies - separate MRs per tool. Covers the fetched binaries (shellcheck, gitleaks, cosign) and the pip/npm tools (pyyaml, tqdm, yamllint, pytest, pytest-cov, requests, markdownlint-cli2). Excludes docker (the build base, handled by the docker-ci-images group) and trivy (the security-scanner base image, handled by its own digest-pinned rule) so those keep their digests.
